Can_Holder.description:
Want to be the center of attention at your next gathering?
Stand out with one of these bad boys.
Slap a can in and enjoy easy care free sipping!

Picture To Come!

Colour Options:
 - Enquire about what colours are avalible

Surface Texture - Underside only
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Standard Textured

Trolley_Key.description:
Don't carry coins becasue you're not a boomer?
Then this little dohickey is your saviour
Slap this bad boy in the coin slot of your trolley!

Picture To Come!


Colour Options:
 - Enquire about what colours are avalible

Surface Texture

Move along nothing to see here.

Large_Case.description:
This is the big one! 
Store all your vials in one case.

Holds:
 - 54x 3ml Vials

Colour Options:
Each component can be customised to a colour of choice.
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base
 - Insert

Surface Texture
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Standard Textured

Medium_Case.description:
Handy for storing your lyophilized vials in the freezer.

Holds:
 - 10x 3ml Vials

Fully Customisable Components
Customise each part with your preferred colour
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base
 - Insert

Surface Texture
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Standard Textured

Mixed_Case.description:
Medium-sized case that fits nicely into the fridge.

Holds:
 - 8x 3ml Vials
 - 6x 10ml Vials

Fully Customisable Components
Customise each part with your preferred colour
 - Latches
 - Lid / Base
 - Internal Insert

Surface Texture
 - Carbon Fibre Look
 - Standard Textured

Travel_Case.description:
Compact durable case for travel.
Large area to hold insulin needles and other goodies.

Holds:
 - 10x 3ml Vials
 - 1x 10 Vial

Fully Customisable Components
Customise each part with your preferred colour
 - Latch
 - Lid / Base

Surface Texture
